description.text:
(Translated from Chinese by AI)
1. Fixed an issue where the launcher would crash immediately upon opening on some devices.  
2. Added scrolling display for warning dialog buttons to fix the issue where some text was not fully displayed.  
3. Optimized the display effect of the version management list and added type filtering functionality.  
4. Optimized the layout display effect of the installation version page.  
5. Fixed an issue where the retry button on the download page was incorrectly positioned.  
6. Added custom resolution functionality.  
7. Optimized the inventory scaling feature, allowing for more precise customization of inventory size.

（若启动器内下载缓慢请使用网盘下载,64位的请下载arm64，不知道该下哪个的请下载all）
1.修复部分设备打开启动器直接崩溃的问题
2.为警告对话框按钮添加滚动显示修复部分文字显示不全的问题
3.优化版本管理列表显示效果，增加类型过滤功能
4.优化安装版本页面布局显示效果
5.修复下载页面重试按钮位置错误的问题
6.添加自定义分辨率功能
7.优化物品栏缩放功能，允许更加精确地自定义物品栏大小
